commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: And by their prayer for you. The poor Saints of Jerusalem who receive your alms, while praying, for you, will also glorify God. This clause is to he connected with "they glorify God."

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Paul praises them because they gave thanks even for things which were given to others, in spite of their own poverty. No one is more envious than the poor, but these people were free of that passion, so much so that they were able to rejoice in the blessings given to others.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
